title: Validate Generated Map Entrypoint Contracts
scope: Swooper Maps generated map SDK entrypoints
forbids: generated map entrypoints that drift from canonical public config envelopes or inline raw recipe operation envelopes
why: Generated map entrypoints are a structural SDK surface and must remain tied to canonical config JSON inputs.
remediate: Regenerate map entrypoints from canonical map configs and standard recipe artifacts.
message: Generated map SDK entrypoint drifted from canonical config envelope shape.
